## Meeting Purpose

[Leadership weekly sync to discuss org structure, hiring, process improvements, and upcoming changes](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Major restructuring and process changes coming, including new org chart, roles/responsibilities, and move to Linear for project management](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=39.0)
  - [Aggressive hiring push for MEs and CMs underway to support growth; aiming for 40+ CMs by end of month](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Shifting to more full-time contractors vs freelancers for better consistency and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Series of meetings planned next week to roll out changes to directors, MEs, and broader team](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

## Topics

### Org Structure and Hiring

  - [New org chart being finalized with clearer reporting lines](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Hired 3 new people yesterday, mostly offshore and within budget](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Aiming for 13 MEs and \~40 CMs to support projected 65 customers in June](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Considering hiring extra MEs for overcapacity/flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)
  - [Shifting away from freelancers to more full-time contractors for consistency](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Moving project management to Linear from Notion/Airtable](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
  - [Creating standardized 12-week onboarding process for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Developing clearer roles/responsibilities for directors, MEs, CMs](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Planning to eventually build client-facing dashboard to show progress](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)

### Upcoming Changes Rollout

  - [Friday (4/4): 90 min meeting with directors to preview changes](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Monday (4/7): 3 hour meeting for directors to review accounts](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [Tuesday (4/8): 3 hour meeting with directors + MEs to set up Linear projects](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=2413.0)
  - [Later in week: All-hands to communicate changes company-wide](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=2472.0)

### Client Management

  - [Need to improve visibility into account health and standardize reporting](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1027.0)
  - [Considering how to handle programmatic SEO clients who need higher volume](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [Exploring ways to show more tangible value/progress to clients](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1383.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matthew to finalize and share org chart + roles/responsibilities docs](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1903.0)
  - [Marcel to complete 12-week client onboarding template](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=74.0)
  - [Daniel to set up Linear projects and Slack channels over weekend](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Leadership to prepare account reviews ahead of Monday's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=2004.0)
  - [Schedule all-hands later next week to communicate changes broadly](https://fathom.video/share/dquWwBtpStTBULkALsDMw5xyyB2m3Di7?tab=summary&timestamp=2640.0)
